How it works Features Security Share One Get One Link
Builders

The whole thing is yours to read.

Every protocol, every crate, every shader, every word of this site. AGPL-3.0. Fork it, run your own, propose changes, ship your own client. Nothing is gated behind a partner program.

Source on GitHub → Protocol spec
The crates

One Link is 38 small crates.

Each does one thing. Each is independently auditable. Each compiles to native, WASM, or both. Pulled together by the daemon.

ol_pair_qr

QR pairing handshake. Ed25519 invite, X25519 chain key, 5-word SAS, Levenshtein-audited word list. PQ-hybrid via ML-KEM mix-in.

ol_onion

Sphinx Coherence routing. Ristretto255 filler-byte construction. PQ-hybrid blinding. Field-witness binding. Schnorr aggregation via Pippenger MSM.

ol_coherence_field

Damped Helmholtz solver for the tau_c routing field. 10,000 peers in 1.74 ms on a single CPU core (criterion bench). Couples to homology and ratchet. GPU path lands in v0.22.

ol_transfer

The native chunked transfer pipeline. AEAD per chunk, rekey every N, fountain coding fallback for lossy links.

ol_ratchet

Double Ratchet over the post-quantum hybrid root. Forward secrecy on every chunk and message.

ol_capability

Macaroon-based caps. Constant-time verification. 1M-iteration soundness gate. Granular per-resource scoping.

ol_threshold_recovery

k-of-n share split with BN multi-sig, per-signer R values. Survive a lost device without surviving a leak.

ol_confidential

Confidential-compute provider trait. Software baseline (ChaCha20-Poly1305 + Zeroize). Hardware backends (TPM, Secure Enclave, SGX, SEV-SNP, TrustZone) plug in.

ol_routing

tau_c-driven path selection. Routing decisions are field-gradient followers, not lookup-table walkers.

ol_homology

Topological partition detection. Spots network splits in one gossip round. 0% false positives across a 5M-iteration fuzz gate.

ol_pqsig + ol_pqkem

Ed25519 + ML-DSA-65 hybrid signatures, X25519 + ML-KEM-768 hybrid KEM. The post-quantum layer.

ol_duress

Secondary passphrase opens a believable empty account. The math gives you a way out under coercion.

26 more crates in the source. See them all on GitHub.

Reproducible by you

Rebuild this site in your tab.

One click downloads the signed source archive, computes its SHA-256 locally, and compares it against the attestation chain. If you and we both arrive at the same hash, no human has touched the result. Every release should be reproducible by anyone with a network connection and a browser. Here it is.

downloading + hashing 

      

    

  


  

    

      Run your own relay
      
Become part of the network.

      
A relay is a single binary that holds and forwards encrypted bundles. It cannot read anything. It does not need an account. Anyone can run one.

      
# on a small VPS, raspberry pi, or your old laptop
curl https://weareone-link.org/relay/install.sh | sh
one-link-relay start

# that is it. your relay shows up on the live mesh
# within seconds, and starts helping the network

      
No registration. No reputation system that we control. The network's topology detector picks healthy relays and routes around sick ones automatically.

    

  


  






  

    

      

        One Link
        
A free, private network for messages, files, and devices. Owned by no one. Belongs to everyone.
